| Brand | Location of Promotion | Eligible Staff | Incentive Type | Incentive Description | SKUs/Products | |--------------------|------------------------------|----------------------|----------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| | Acqua Di Parma | All stores | Shilla Payroll | Cash | Varying cash per bottle sold: $250.00, $2.50, $4.00, $6.00, $8.00, $10.00 | 1166113000001 (ICOLONIA EDC), 1166113000003 (COLONIA ESSENZA), 166113000040 (COLONIA PURA), 1166113000082 (COLONIA INTENSA), 1166113000147 (C.LU.B), 1166113000084 (SIG. OSMANTHUS EDP), 166113000086 (SIG. OSMANTHUS EDP), 1166113000050 (SIG. OUD), 166113000222 (ARANCIA DI CAPRI EDT), 166113000247 (MIRTO DI PANAREA SUMMER), etc. (All listed SKUs in data) | | Cartier | All terminals | Shilla Payroll | Cash | $5.00 cash per bottle of Cartier perfume sold | All Cartier perfumes | | CK, Chloe, Kylie | Wing and Arrival | GS BAs | Voucher | - $30 voucher per $1,200 CK sales
- $30 voucher per $1,500 Chloe sales
- $10 voucher per 3 Kylie bottles | All CK, Chloe, Kylie products (specific SKUs not listed) | | Diptyque | All stores | Shilla Payroll | Cash | $5.00 cash per item sold for listed SKUs | 064113000562 (Reed Diffuser Roses), 064113000625 (Hourglass Baies), 064113000726 (Eau Rose Hair Mist), 064113000754 (Encre Candle), 064113000774 (Valentines Duo), etc. (All listed Diptyque SKUs) | | Drunk Elephant | Terminals 1-3 | Shiseido Group BAs | Voucher | - $10 voucher per $600 sales
- $10 voucher per 5 Lippe Balm Reform sets sold | 2ansro000045 (Lippe Balm Reform) | | Fragrance (Burberry, Guccicos) | All stores | All staff | Voucher | $10 voucher per 2 focus SKUs sold (Festive Limited Edition makeup) | 99350155597 (BURBERRY Mascara), 99350207322 (BURBERRY Cushion), 99350210835 (GUCCICOS Festiglow), 99350181584 (GUCCICOS Mascara), etc. (All listed SKUs) | | Fragrance Multibrand | All stores | All staff | Voucher | $10 voucher per focus SKU sold (multibrand fragrances) | 199350198240 (Goddess EDP), 199350198245 (Hero EDT), 199350200719 (Chloe EDP), 199350199173 (Flora Gardenia), etc. (All listed SKUs) | | Hermes Fragrance | Terminals 1-4 | All staff | Voucher, Product | - $15 voucher per 3 Xmas sets (capped at $120)
- 1 tester per 10 sets
- $50 voucher per 10 85ml/100ml sales (capped at $100) | Xmas sets, Twilly Collection (50ml/85ml), Barenia (30ml/60ml/100ml) | | Hermes Beauty | All stores | All staff | Voucher, Product | - $30 voucher per 6 Eye/Lip sales (capped at $120)
- 1 tester per 6 sales | Eye pencils, lip pencils, eyeliners, eyeshadow palettes, mascaras | | Lancaster | All stores | All staff | Voucher | $10 voucher per 4 SKUs sold (sunscreen products) | 088210000012 (SPF 30), 088210000013 (SPF 50), 088210000024 (Sun Control), etc. (All listed Lancaster SKUs) | | Nars | All stores | All staff | Voucher | Tiered vouchers: $10 ($1k sales), $50 ($3k sales), $80 ($5k sales) | All Nars products | --- **Recommendations & Analysis** 1. **Top 3 Most Attractive Incentives** - **Diptyque’s $5 cash per item sold**: Immediate cash rewards per item incentivize rapid sales. - **Cartier’s $5 cash per perfume bottle**: Simple, high-frequency payout structure. - **Hermes Fragrance’s $50 voucher for 10 bottles**: High-value reward for bulk sales. 2. **Top 3 Strategies to Compete** - **Offer tiered cash incentives**: Beat Diptyque by providing $6-$7 cash per premium product sold. - **Bundle high-margin items with testers**: Counter Hermes’ tester rewards by offering exclusive LVMH product testers for every 5 units sold. - **Simplify voucher thresholds**: For mid-tier brands, provide vouchers at lower sales thresholds (e.g., $30 per $1,000 sales vs. $1,200 for CK). 3. **Ensuring Staff Adoption** - Use clear, visual comparison charts to show higher payouts (e.g., “Sell one LVMH perfume = $6 cash vs. $5 for Cartier”). - Train staff to emphasize exclusive testers as “perks” rather than just monetary rewards. - Simplify tiered structures with progress trackers (e.g., “Hit $1k sales today, unlock $10 instantly”). *Assumptions: Locations/staff eligibility inferred for brands with incomplete data. SKUs simplified for readability; full lists are in source data.*
